expectations.text: Reads or references all three core CSVs (scenes.csv, scene-briefs.csv, scene-intent.csv)
expectations.evidence: Separate sections for each CSV file plus all registry CSVs

expectations.text: Checks or mentions multiple hone domains (at least 2 of: registries, gaps, briefs, structural)
expectations.evidence: Covers gaps (missing briefs), registries (missing locations, characters), structural (status inconsistency, chapter map), physical states

expectations.text: Identifies new-x1 (or scenes with empty fields) as having data gaps
expectations.evidence: Identifies new-x1 as 'almost entirely empty' and act2-sc01/act2-sc02 as missing from scene-briefs.csv

expectations.text: Presents findings in a prioritized or structured way
expectations.evidence: 5-step numbered recommended next steps, organized by severity

expectations.text: Recommends which domain to tackle first based on the project state
expectations.evidence: Recommends registries first, then briefs development, then physical-state fixes
